name: construction project coordinators managing 5–10 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction project coordinators processing 5–10 permit applications/month, inefficient submission processes cause delays in project timelines. We streamline the application process instead of manual tracking and submission of permit applications.
target_audience: construction project coordinators managing 5–10 permit applications/month
problem_solved: Inefficient government submission processes for permits
